zh-CN.name: 土豆
zh-CN.intro: 土豆是一种棕色的蔬菜，圆圆的，长在泥土下面。它吃起来软软的，可以做成薯条、土豆泥，好多好吃的！

story.title: 🥔挖土豆
story.body: 小鼹鼠在花园里钻来钻去，突然碰到一个硬硬的东西。它用小爪子挖开泥土，哇，是一个圆滚滚的土豆！小鼹鼠高兴地把土豆滚回家。妈妈笑着说：我们来煮土豆汤吧！小鼹鼠帮忙洗土豆，皮上还有细细的根呢。水开了，土豆在锅里咕嘟咕嘟地煮着，慢慢变软了。厨房里飘出香香的味道。邻居小田鼠闻到香味，探进头来。小鼹鼠盛了一碗汤给它，两个小伙伴一起喝汤，心里暖暖的。小鼹鼠说：原来地下的土豆这么美味呀！

knowledge.title: 吃土豆有什么好处？
knowledge.body: 土豆有很多淀粉，能给我们身体提供能量，让我们有力气跑跑跳跳。土豆还能做成薯条、薯片、土豆泥，是很棒的蔬菜！

en.name: Potato
en.intro: A potato is a brown vegetable that is round and grows underground. It tastes soft and can be made into french fries, mashed potatoes, and many yummy foods!

story.title: 🥔Digging Potatoes
story.body: Little Mole was burrowing in the garden when he bumped into something hard. He used his paws to dig away the dirt and wow — a round, plump potato! Overjoyed, he rolled the potato home. Mama smiled and said, Let's make potato soup! Little Mole helped wash the potato; it had tiny roots on its skin. The water boiled, and the potato cooked with a bubbling sound, slowly turning soft. A delicious smell drifted through the kitchen. Neighbor Vole sniffed the air and peeked in. Little Mole poured him a bowl of soup, and the two friends sipped together, feeling warm inside. Little Mole said, Potatoes from underground are so tasty!

knowledge.title: Why is eating potatoes good for you?
knowledge.body: Potatoes are full of starch, which gives your body energy to run and play. You can make french fries, chips, or mashed potatoes — they are a wonderful vegetable!
